hero.subtitle: You're in the right place to take better screenshots.

why.label: The Extremes
why.title: Windows users shouldn't have to choose between beauty and friction.
bullets: Beautiful screenshot apps are often locked behind freemium pricing.
Free power-user tools are visually dated with a steep learning curve.
Basic tools are easy to use, but lack the polish for professional communication.

gap.label: The Gap
gap.title: You want polished screenshots, not a 30-minute tutorial.
bullets: New users are pushed away by tools that expose too many options too early.
Exporting a clean, redacted image shouldn't require a patchwork of apps.
Your screenshots should look intentional and ready to share, instantly.

answer.label: The Sweet Spot
answer.title: XenSnip brings premium visual quality to Windows, for free.
bullets: A beautiful, modern interface that is instantly familiar to new users.
No paywalls, no watermarks. 100% free and local-first.
The perfect balance between editing power and approachability.

evidence.label: One Workflow
evidence.title: Capture, annotate, beautify, and export without leaving the app.
bullets: Add padding, styling, and beautiful backgrounds in one click.
Blur, pixelate, and redact sensitive information seamlessly.
Extract text on-device and copy it directly to your clipboard. First use may require a model download.

result.label: The Result
result.title: Your screenshots, finally looking as professional as your work.
bullets: Stop fighting with complicated, cluttered interfaces.
Stop paying subscriptions for basic screenshot beautification.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about XenSnip.

data.question: Why not use ShareX or Lightshot?
data.answer: ShareX is powerful but has a steep learning curve. Lightshot is fast but lacks modern polishing tools. XenSnip finds the sweet spot: beautiful, fast, and modern without the complexity.

data.question: Does XenSnip support Windows only?
data.answer: Yes, XenSnip is built specifically for Windows to ensure deep integration with native capture APIs and a seamless desktop experience.

data.question: Is XenSnip free?
data.answer: Absolutely. XenSnip is 100% free with no watermarks, no paywalls, and no subscriptions.

data.question: Is XenSnip local-first?
data.answer: Yes. Your screenshots and data stay on your device. We don't upload your captures to any cloud server.

data.question: What does OCR support include?
data.answer: The current release includes on-device OCR for selected regions. It does not upload screenshots to the cloud, but first use may require an internet connection to download the OCR model.

data.question: What does the installer include?
data.answer: The lightweight installer includes the core XenSnip utility and all necessary libraries for local image processing and OCR.

cta.title: Ready to take better screenshots?
cta.subtitle: Download XenSnip today and start communicating with polished, professional visuals.
